alt: Koala mother with joey peeking from her fur
caption: Joeys are born tiny and finish growing inside the mother's backward-opening pouch.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the koala gallery set. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5f/Koala_-_Joey_-_Flickr_-_GregTheBusker.jpg
